PhD – Doctorate

MENU

IMPORTANT INFORMATION

The tuition amounts listed in the table represent the annual tuition fees for the 2025–2026 academic year. To benefit from special discounts, applicants must complete the pre-application form provided below.

Doctoral programs' tuition covers two years. Students will complete their first-year payment by paying one full year of tuition based on the fee announced for the 2025–2026 academic year, and their second-year payment by paying one full year of tuition based on the annual tuition fee to be announced at the beginning of the 2026–2027 academic year. In doctoral programs, tuition payments are limited to two years regardless of the total duration of study until graduation.

(Doctoral programs in Dentistry will be charged for a total of four years.)

Important Note: Students who enrolled in the Spring semester of the 2024–2025 academic year and are currently continuing their graduate studies must complete their second-year tuition payment before the start of the upcoming Spring semester. Students who make their second-year tuition payment by the evening of November 28, 2025, will be eligible for the early payment discount. Students wishing to complete their payments should contact the Financial Affairs Office:
